name: hig-technologies
description: >- Apple HIG guidance for Apple technology integrations: Siri, Apple Pay, HealthKit, HomeKit, ARKit, machine learning, generative AI, iCloud, Sign in with Apple, SharePlay, CarPlay, Game Center, in-app purchase, NFC, Wallet, VoiceOver, Maps, Mac Catalyst, and more. Use when asked about: "Siri integration", "Apple Pay", "HealthKit", "HomeKit", "ARKit", "augmented reality", "machine learning", "generative AI", "iCloud sync", "Sign in with Apple", "SharePlay", "CarPlay", "in-app purchase", "NFC", "
author: raintree-technology
summary_zh: 汇总了苹果各类系统服务和技术框架的人机界面指南，涵盖 Siri、Apple Pay、HealthKit、ARKit、生成式 AI、CarPlay 等，方便开发者在集成苹果生态功能时快速查阅设计规范。
